task_completion.description: Set the session frame rate to 24 fps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '24 fps' or '24' in the timecode/framerate display, session properties, or project settings window.
Look for a track header in the Ardour editor window with the name 'Voiceover'.

task_completion.description: Import narration.wav into the Voiceover track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an audio region (waveform) visible inside the 'Voiceover' track. The region name should indicate 'narration'.

task_completion.description: Position the audio region at SMPTE Timecode 00:01:30:12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the start of the audio region aligning with '00:01:30:12' on the timeline ruler, or the region properties/spot dialog showing its start time as 00:01:30:12.

task_completion.description: Lock the audio region to the timeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a lock icon/indicator on the audio region in the timeline, or the region properties showing a 'Locked' checkbox ticked.
Look for the 'File' -> 'Save' menu option being clicked, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) next to the project name in the title bar.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour application window being interacted with, rather than a terminal window editing the .ardour XML file directly.

integrity.description: The audio file was imported using the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Ardour import dialog or file browser navigating to '/home/ga/Audio/samples/' and selecting 'narration.wav'.

integrity.description: The agent positioned the clip using the timeline or region properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the mouse cursor dragging the region, or a dialog box (like Region Properties or Spot) open with the timecode entered manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target timecode is exactly 00:01:30:12 at 24 fps. The audio source file is '/home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav'. The track must be named 'Voiceover'. The region must be locked to the timeline. Look for visual indicators of 24 fps, the specific timecode 00:01:30:12 in the region properties or timeline ruler, and a lock icon on the region.
